name: Sauteed Tenderloin Steaks with Wine Sauce
recipeIngredient: Tenderloin steaks (top loin center cut, 1 1/4-inch thick, weighing 8 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the steaks of excess fat and pat dry with towels.
2. Brush the steaks lightly with olive oil.
3. Lightly oil a nonstick pan.
4. Saute the steaks for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes on each side until desired doneness is reached (red rare, or longer for medium).
5. Remove the steaks to a warm plate.
6. Degrease most of the fat from the skillet, leaving about one teaspoon.
7. Add the sliced scallion and stir briefly.
8. Pour in the red wine and scrape up any browned bits (deglaze). Boil until reduced to a syrupy consistency.
9. Remove from heat, add butter and garnish with parsley or chives if desired, then pour over the steaks.
Yield: 2 servings
